ItacPersonItem.Notes: His original name was Ludovico, but he was commonly known as il Ventimiglia. He adopted several different names and nicknames. See his biography by Alberto Asor Rosa, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
